title: New AI chatbot launched to help people in unsafe home situations
title_zh: 推出新型人工智能聊天机器人，帮助处于不安全家庭环境中的人们
description: People seeking help for unsafe home situations can now chat with an AI bot on the Veilig Thuiswebsite, the organization announced Monday.
description_zh: 该组织周一宣布，寻求不安全家居状况帮助的人们现在可以在 Veilig Thuis 网站上与人工智能机器人聊天。

title: Three minors sentenced for May riots in Scheveningen
title_zh: 三名未成年人因五月斯赫弗宁恩骚乱被判刑
description: Three minors, aged 14, 15, and 17, have been sentenced to community service ranging from 30 to 70 hours for their involvement in
description_zh: 三名年龄分别为 14 岁、15 岁和 17 岁的未成年人因参与

title: Revised Dutch land use plan scales back protections for nature and agriculture
title_zh: 荷兰土地利用规划修订，削减自然和农业保护
description: The Dutch government has released a revised draft of the Nota Ruimte, the national spatial planning plan outlining land use and development in the Netherlands through 2050, with several measures af
description_zh: 荷兰政府发布了《Nota Ruimte》的修订草案，这是一份国家空间规划计划，概述了荷兰到 2050 年的土地使用和发展，其中包括几项措施

title: Anti-immigration riots in The Hague caused €89,000 in damage to Binnenhof and D66 office
title_zh: 海牙反移民骚乱导致内庭和 D66 办公室损失 89,000 欧元
description: Last week’santi-immigration riots in The Haguecaused an estimated 89,000 eur
description_zh: 上周海牙的反移民骚乱造成了约 89,000 欧元的损失

title: King Willem-Alexander to make first Dutch state visit to Suriname since 1978
title_zh: 荷兰国王威廉·亚历山大将自 1978 年以来首次对苏里南进行国事访问
description: King Willem-Alexander will visit Suriname this year at the invitation of the country’s government, shortly after the 50th independence anniversary on November 25.
description_zh: 应苏里南政府的邀请，威廉·亚历山大国王将于今年 11 月 25 日苏里南独立 50 周年后不久访问苏里南。

title: Dutch shoppers favor store brands as A-brand prices soar
title_zh: 荷兰消费者青睐自有品牌，A 品牌价格飙升
description: Dutch consumers are increasingly buying supermarket store brands as the price difference with A-brands grows, according to recent market research.
description_zh: 最近的市场调查显示，随着与 A 级品牌的价格差异不断扩大，荷兰消费者越来越多地购买超市商店品牌产品。

title: Military convoy with 55-ton artillery guns to cross Noord-Brabant and Gelderland
title_zh: 载有 55 吨火炮的军事车队穿越北布拉班特省和海尔德兰省
description: A military convoy carrying four 55-ton armored howitzers will travel through Noord-Brabant and Gelderland on Saturday as the Dutch armed forces move equipment for a large-scale exercise.
description_zh: 一支载有四门 55 吨装甲榴弹炮的军事车队将于周六穿过北布拉班特省和海尔德兰省，荷兰武装部队将运送装备进行大规模演习。

title: Amsterdam Mayor Femke Halsema wins an award for LGBTQ+ advocacy
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长 Femke Halsema 荣获 LGBTQ+ 倡导奖
description: Amsterdam Mayor Femke Halsema received a Winq Award Friday evening for her active support and defense of LGBTQ+ rights, including her
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长 Femke Halsema 周五晚间获得了 Winq 奖，以表彰她积极支持和捍卫 LGBTQ+ 权利，包括她的

title: Dutch supermarkets plan for food supply during crises
title_zh: 荷兰超市制定危机期间的食品供应计划
description: Dutch supermarkets are creating crisis plans to keep essential food available amid warnings of power outages, cyberattacks, and potential wartime disruptions.
description_zh: 在停电、网络攻击和潜在战争干扰的警告下，荷兰超市正在制定危机计划，以确保基本食品的供应。

title: Five Dutch asylum centers cancel open days amid violent protests
title_zh: 荷兰五家庇护中心因暴力抗议取消开放日
description: Five asylum seeker centers in the Netherlands—includingone in Hoofddorp, two in Amsterdam,
description_zh: 荷兰有五个寻求庇护者中心，其中一个在霍夫多普，两个在阿姆斯特丹，

title: Dutch women’s and men’s rowing teams take gold at Shanghai World Championships
title_zh: 荷兰女子和男子赛艇队在上海世界锦标赛上夺得金牌
description: The Netherlands claimed double gold in rowing at the World Championships on Saturday, with both the women’s and men’s eights dominating their finals in Shanghai.
description_zh: 荷兰队在周六举行的世界锦标赛赛艇比赛中夺得双金，女子和男子八人单桨艇项目均在上海的决赛中占据主导地位。

title: Dutch government designates 127 sites for 1.65 million new homes by 2050
title_zh: 荷兰政府指定 127 个地点，到 2050 年建造 165 万套新住房
description: The Dutch cabinet has announced 127 locations nationwide for large-scale housing development, aiming to add hundreds of thousands of homes by 2050.
description_zh: 荷兰内阁宣布在全国范围内确定127个大型住房开发地点，目标是到2050年增加数十万套住房。

title: Netherlands ends funding for Rotterdam floating climate center, likely to move to Kenya
title_zh: 荷兰终止资助鹿特丹浮动气候中心，可能迁至肯尼亚
description: The Netherlands will stop funding the Global Center on Adaptation (GCA) in Rotterdam after next year, threatening the future of the institute and raising the prospect of relocation to Kenya,
description_zh: 荷兰将于明年停止资助位于鹿特丹的全球适应中心（GCA），这将威胁该中心的未来，并有可能将其迁至肯尼亚。

title: Driver killed in early morning crash in Bladel; Police investigating cause
title_zh: 布拉德尔凌晨发生车祸，司机身亡；警方正在调查原因
description: A driver was killed early Saturday in a single-vehicle crash on the N284 in Bladel, police said.
description_zh: 警方称，周六凌晨，一名司机在布莱德尔 N284 公路上发生单车事故，不幸身亡。

title: Man injured in stabbing at gas station on A15 near Rhoon
title_zh: 一名男子在 A15 高速公路 Rhoon 附近的加油站被刺伤
description: A man was injured in a stabbing at a gas station along the A15 highway south of Rotterdam shortly before 1 a.m. Saturday, police said.
description_zh: 警方称，周六凌晨 1 点左右，鹿特丹南部 A15 高速公路旁的一家加油站发生一起持刀伤人事件。

title: Occupational health agencies warn of rising stress-related absenteeism
title_zh: 职业健康机构警告因压力导致的缺勤率上升
description: The number of employees in the Netherlands calling in sick for work due to stress-related issues has increased significantly in the last five years.
description_zh: 过去五年来，荷兰因压力相关问题请病假的员工数量大幅增加。

title: Employers often underestimate number of employees with chronic illness, researchers say
title_zh: 研究人员称，雇主经常低估患有慢性病的员工数量
description: Many employers underestimate how many people with chronic illnesses are working at their organizations.
description_zh: 许多雇主低估了其组织中患有慢性疾病的员工数量。

title: Police arrest German man, 49, over fatal attack on 66-year-old in Herkenbosch
title_zh: 警方逮捕一名 49 岁德国男子，他因在赫肯博斯袭击一名 66 岁老人而死亡
description: Police in Montfort, Limburg, have arrested a 49-year-old German man in connection with the killing of a 66-year-old resident of Herkenbosch, who was attacked with a pole fitted with a knife.
description_zh: 林堡省蒙福特市警方逮捕了一名 49 岁的德国男子，他涉嫌杀害一名 66 岁的赫尔肯博斯居民，该居民遭到一根装有刀的棍子袭击。

title: Dutch consumer regulator warns against fraudulent home battery sales
title_zh: 荷兰消费者监管机构警告警惕家用电池欺诈销售
description: The Netherlands Authority for Consumers and Markets (ACM) is warning consumers about fraudulent telephone sales of home batteries by the company Opslagplan.
description_zh: 荷兰消费者和市场管理局 (ACM) 警告消费者，Opslagplan 公司通过电话欺诈性地销售家用电池。

title: BMW recalls nearly 14,000 cars in the Netherlands over starter motor fire risk
title_zh: 宝马因启动马达存在起火风险在荷兰召回近 14,000 辆汽车
description: BMW has issued a recall for almost 14,000 vehicles in the Netherlands because of problems with the starter motor.
description_zh: 由于起动马达存在问题，宝马已在荷兰召回近 14,000 辆汽车。

title: Dutch fiscal investigation service seizes 44 cars and luxury items in tax fraud probe
title_zh: 荷兰财政调查局在税务欺诈调查中查获 44 辆汽车和奢侈品
description: The FIOD, the Dutch Fiscal Information and Investigation Service, has seized 44 vehicles, physical and digital records, mobile phones, computers, cash, bank accounts, a bitcoin, and 20 luxury watch
description_zh: 荷兰财政信息和调查局 (FIOD) 查获了 44 辆汽车、实物和数字记录、手机、电脑、现金、银行账户、比特币和 20 块豪华手表

title: Nearly 75% of Dutch entrepreneurs face rising economic uncertainty
title_zh: 近 75% 的荷兰企业家面临日益加剧的经济不确定性
description: Almost 75% of Dutch business owners faced greater economic uncertainty last year, largely driven by shifts in market demand, geopolitical events, and national policy, according to research by Stati
description_zh: 根据Stati的研究，去年近75%的荷兰企业主面临更大的经济不确定性，这主要是由于市场需求、地缘政治事件和国家政策的变化

title: Utrecht Mayor Sharon Dijksma pledges €12 million in funding to fight femicide
title_zh: 乌得勒支市长 Sharon Dijksma 承诺提供 1200 万欧元资金以打击杀害女性行为
description: Mayor Sharon Dijksma pledged additional funding to combat femicide in Utrecht, joining a national campaign against controlling behavior and domestic violence, RTV Utrecht
description_zh: 乌得勒支市市长 Sharon Dijksma 承诺提供额外资金，打击乌得勒支市的杀害女性行为，并加入全国性的反对控制行为和家庭暴力的运动，RTV Utrecht

title: A room of one’s own: Tilda Swinton says young artists priced out
title_zh: 一间自己的房间：蒂尔达·斯文顿称年轻艺术家难以负担
description: At the opening of an autobiographical exhibition in Amsterdam – which will tour the world – Scottish actress Tilda Swinton...
description_zh: 在阿姆斯特丹举行的自传展开幕式上——该展览将在世界各地巡回展出——苏格兰女演员蒂尔达·斯文顿……

title: EU inspection finds serious security gaps at Schiphol Airport
title_zh: 欧盟检查发现史基浦机场存在严重安全漏洞
description: Schiphol Airport’s security has been found lacking, according to a recent inspection by the European Commission.
description_zh: 根据欧盟委员会最近的检查，史基浦机场的安全措施存在缺陷。

title: Amsterdam event shines spotlight on women’s health, menopause, and mental wellness
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹活动聚焦女性健康、更年期和心理健康
description: More than 80 experts, clinicians, and advocates will gather in Amsterdam for the Connected Health Weekend on September 27–28, addressing women’s health, perimenopause, menopause, and mental wellnes
description_zh: 9 月 27 日至 28 日，超过 80 名专家、临床医生和倡导者将齐聚阿姆斯特丹，参加互联健康周末活动，讨论女性健康、围绝经期、绝经期和心理健康问题

title: Asylum seeker centers cancel open day after recent violent protests
title_zh: 近期暴力抗议活动后，寻求庇护者中心取消开放日
description: An asylum seeker's center in Hoofddorp and two in Amsterdam are not taking part in the open day on Saturday after being advised by the police, a spokesperson for the asylum seekers center Noord-Hol
description_zh: 霍夫多普的一家庇护寻求者中心和阿姆斯特丹的两家庇护寻求者中心在接到警方通知后，将不会参加周六的开放日活动，诺德-霍尔庇护寻求者中心的发言人表示

title: Podcast: The What The Hell Els Could Go Wrong Edition
title_zh: 播客：埃尔斯到底会出什么问题
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想要支持 DutchNews 播客并持续供应我们的荷兰焦糖华夫饼和橙子番茄酱吗？点击此处成为……

title: Far-Right riots in The Hague caused 55,000 euros in damage to Dutch parliament
title_zh: 海牙极右翼骚乱致荷兰议会损失5.5万欧元
description: The damage to the Binnenhof, the historic complex in The Hague that houses the Dutch Parliament, following last Saturday’s
description_zh: 上周六的地震对荷兰议会所在地海牙历史建筑群内庭造成了破坏

title: Israel used Microsoft’s Dutch data centre for mass surveillance
title_zh: 以色列利用微软荷兰数据中心进行大规模监控
description: Microsoft’s vice-president Brad Smith has admitted that the Israeli army used the company’s huge data centre in Middenmeer, north of...
description_zh: 微软副总裁布拉德·史密斯承认，以色列军队使用了该公司位于以色列北部米登梅尔的大型数据中心……

title: Refugee centres cancel open days on police advise after protests
title_zh: 抗议活动爆发后，难民中心根据警方建议取消开放日
description: Open days at one refugee centre in Hoofdorp and two in Amsterdam have been canceled on police advice follow a...
description_zh: 根据警方的建议，霍夫多普的一个难民中心和阿姆斯特丹的两个难民中心的开放日已被取消……

title: Massive military convoy to cross the Netherlands on Saturday; Traffic delays expected
title_zh: 大型军事车队将于周六穿越荷兰；预计交通将出现延误
description: A military convoy is set to make its way across the Netherlands on Saturday. The convoy, which includes four self-propelled howitzers, will cover a distance of around 200 kilometers.
description_zh: 一支军事车队将于周六穿越荷兰。该车队包括四门自行榴弹炮，行程约200公里。

title: Netherlands to return 28,000 colonial-era fossils to Indonesia
title_zh: 荷兰将向印度尼西亚归还28,000件殖民时代化石
description: The Netherlands will return more than 28,000 fossils from the Dubois collection — prehistoric bones and shells taken from Indonesia during colonial rule — ending over a century of Dutch possession,
description_zh: 荷兰将归还杜波依斯收藏的 28,000 多件化石，这些化石是殖民统治期间从印度尼西亚夺取的史前骨骼和贝壳，结束了荷兰长达一个多世纪的占有。

title: The Netherlands to return Dubois fossil collection to Indonesia
title_zh: 荷兰将杜波依斯化石藏品归还印度尼西亚
description: The Netherlands is returning a major archaeological collection to Indonesia, including the skullcap discovered by Dutch scientist Eugène Dubois in...
description_zh: 荷兰将向印度尼西亚归还一批重要的考古藏品，其中包括荷兰科学家 Eugène Dubois 在……发现的头盖骨。

title: Dutch industrial housing maker cleared to build millions of homes
title_zh: 荷兰工业住宅制造商获准建造数百万套住宅
description: Van Wijnen, the country’s largest industrial housing developer, has received a key type approval from certification institute Kiwa, clearing millions of variations of its factory-built prefab homes
description_zh: 该国最大的工业住宅开发商 Van Wijnen 已获得认证机构 Kiwa 的关键类型批准，为其工厂建造的数百万套预制住宅颁发了许可

title: Amsterdam to enforce ban on microcars on ferries and bike paths
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹将禁止微型汽车在渡轮和自行车道上行驶
description: Amsterdam will begin enforcement actions this fall to prevent microcars, also known as brommobielen, from being used on city ferries and bike paths, city officials announced on Thursday.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市政府官员周四宣布，阿姆斯特丹将于今年秋天开始采取执法行动，禁止微型汽车（也称为 brommobielen）在城市渡轮和自行车道上使用。

title: Dutch prime minister defends United Nations at general assembly
title_zh: 荷兰首相在联合国大会上为联合国辩护
description: Dutch caretaker prime minister Dick Schoof has underlined the importance of the United Nations in a speech at the organisation’s...
description_zh: 荷兰看守首相迪克·舒夫在联合国大会发表演讲时强调了联合国的重要性......

title: AI leads to job cuts at Just Eat Takeaway, 175 to go in NL
title_zh: AI 导致 Just Eat Takeaway 裁员，荷兰将裁员 175 人
description: Just Eat Takeaway, the Dutch firm behind food delivery service Thuisbezorgd, is cutting 450 jobs worldwide due to its increasing...
description_zh: 食品配送服务 Thuisbezorgd 背后的荷兰公司 Just Eat Takeaway 因业务不断增长而在全球范围内裁员 450 人……

title: Another KLM flight diverts amid third drone disruption in Danish airspace this week
title_zh: 本周，丹麦领空第三次发生无人机干扰，荷兰皇家航空公司的另一架航班被迫改道
description: A KLM flight from Amsterdam to Aalborg was forced to turn back Thursday night after reports of drones near Aalborg Airport in Nordjylland, Denmark,
description_zh: 周四晚，荷兰皇家航空公司一架从阿姆斯特丹飞往奥尔堡的航班因接到报告称在丹麦北日德兰地区奥尔堡机场附近发现无人机而被迫返航。

title: Netherlands and Uganda agree to asylum return centers for rejected asylum seekers
title_zh: 荷兰和乌干达同意为被拒绝的寻求庇护者设立庇护遣返中心
description: The Netherlands and Uganda have signed a memorandum of intent to establish a return center in Uganda for rejected asylum seekers, Caretaker Minister for Asylum Affairs David van Weel (VVD) confirme
description_zh: 荷兰和乌干达已签署意向备忘录，将在乌干达为被拒绝的寻求庇护者建立一个遣返中心，荷兰看守庇护事务部长戴维·范韦尔 (VVD) 证实。

title: More protests against refugee centres, seven arrested overnight
title_zh: 针对难民中心的抗议活动增多，七人夜间被捕
description: Protests against asylum centres and refugee shelters took place in several Dutch towns on Thursday evening, with violence breaking out...
description_zh: 周四晚上，荷兰多个城镇爆发了针对庇护中心和难民收容所的抗议活动，并引发了暴力事件......

title: More football drama, Go Ahead Eagles and Utrecht lose in Europe
title_zh: 更多足球戏剧，前进之鹰和乌得勒支在欧洲失利
description: Losses for FC Utrecht and Go Ahead Eagles in their first-round matches of this season’s Europa League mean all five...
description_zh: 乌得勒支足球俱乐部和前进之鹰队在本赛季欧联杯首轮比赛中失利，意味着所有五支球队……

title: Two Dutch teens arrested for spying, possibly for Russia
title_zh: 两名荷兰青少年因从事间谍活动被捕，可能为俄罗斯
description: Police have arrested two Dutch 17-year-olds on suspicion of spying, possibly for Russia, the Telegraaf reported on Friday. According to...
description_zh: 据《每日电讯报》周五报道，警方逮捕了两名17岁的荷兰少年，他们涉嫌从事间谍活动，可能为俄罗斯服务。据……

title: Two Dutch teens arrested in rare Russian espionage case
title_zh: 两名荷兰青少年因罕见的俄罗斯间谍案被捕
description: Dutch authorities have arrested two 17-year-old boys suspected of performing espionage tasks for a Russian intelligence service, in what officials call a “unique case” in the Netherlands,
description_zh: 荷兰当局逮捕了两名涉嫌为俄罗斯情报机构执行间谍任务的 17 岁男孩，官员称这是荷兰的“独特案件”。

title: KLM heads to court to stop next week’s Schiphol strike
title_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司诉诸法庭阻止下周史基浦机场罢工
description: Dutch airline KLM is going to court in an effort to stop next week’s planned eight-hour strike by ground crew....
description_zh: 荷兰航空公司 KLM 将向法院提起诉讼，试图阻止地勤人员下周计划进行的八小时罢工......

title: The Titanic and fashion: a new exhibition in The Hague
title_zh: 泰坦尼克号与时尚：海牙新展览
description: More than a century after the sinking of the Titanic, many of the issues that swirl around the ship’s loss...
description_zh: 泰坦尼克号沉没一个多世纪后，围绕这艘船的沉没的许多问题......

title: Mini cars banned from Amsterdam’s ferries and bike paths
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹的渡轮和自行车道禁止微型汽车通行
description: Amsterdam city council is to get tough on mini cars wrongly using the ferries, pavements and bike paths, according to...
description_zh: 据报道，阿姆斯特丹市议会将严厉打击小型汽车错误使用渡轮、人行道和自行车道的行为……

title: 32-year-old man killed, 33-year-old woman wounded in Sneek shooting
title_zh: 斯内克枪击案致一名 32 岁男子死亡，一名 33 岁女子受伤
description: A 32-year-old man was killed and a 33-year-old woman left in critical condition after a shooting in Sneek, police said. Authorities suspect the man shot the woman before dying himself.
description_zh: 警方称，斯内克发生枪击事件，一名32岁男子死亡，一名33岁女子伤势危急。当局怀疑该男子开枪射杀了该女子后自杀。

title: Seven arrested as riot police clash with protesters in Doetinchem over asylum center
title_zh: 杜廷赫姆因庇护中心事件发生防暴警察与抗议者发生冲突，七人被捕
description: A protest against plans for a temporary asylum center in Doetinchem erupted into violence Thursday night, leading to seven arrests and a heavy police response, according to
description_zh: 据报道，周四晚，针对在杜廷赫姆建立临时庇护中心计划的抗议活动爆发暴力事件，导致七人被捕，警方采取了严厉措施。

title: Netherlands plans to host Ukrainian weapons production
title_zh: 荷兰计划承办乌克兰武器生产
description: The Netherlands plans to let Ukrainian defense companies assemble weapons—including ‘Vampire’ attack drones, small flying bombs that loiter over targets and explode on impact—inside Dutch factories
description_zh: 荷兰计划让乌克兰国防公司在荷兰工厂内组装武器，包括“吸血鬼”攻击无人机，这是一种在目标上空盘旋并在撞击时爆炸的小型飞行炸弹。

title: ING joins European consortium to launch euro stablecoin
title_zh: ING 加入欧洲财团推出欧元稳定币
description: ING is part of a European banking consortium for a so-called euro stablecoin, which is scheduled to be issued for the first time in the second half of next year.
description_zh: ING 是欧洲银行联盟的成员之一，该联盟旨在发行所谓的欧元稳定币，计划于明年下半年首次发行。

title: Over €5 million in fines issued to 12,000 drivers for using phone while driving
title_zh: 12,000 名司机因开车时使用手机被处以超过 500 万欧元的罚款
description: Mobile phone–monitoring speed cameras, known as “focus cameras,” have generated more than 5 million euros in fines in their first months of operation, the Central Judicial Collection Agency (Centra
description_zh: 中央司法征收机构 (Centra) 表示，被称为“焦点摄像头”的手机监控测速摄像头在投入运营的头几个月里已经产生了超过 500 万欧元的罚款。

title: FC Utrecht lose to Lyon as Dutch clubs match unwanted European record
title_zh: 乌得勒支队输给里昂队，荷兰俱乐部追平了不受欢迎的欧洲纪录
description: FC Utrecht fell to Olympique Lyonnais in the UEFA Europa League on Thursday.
description_zh: 乌得勒支足球俱乐部周四在欧足联欧洲联赛中输给了里昂足球俱乐部。

title: VVD proposes €75 million boost for police after violent riots in The Hague
title_zh: 海牙暴力骚乱后，VVD 提议为警察增加 7500 万欧元
description: The VVD party is calling for 75 million euros in additional funding for Dutch police and the introduction of minimum sentences for attacks on law enforcement following anti-immigration
description_zh: 荷兰自由民主党呼吁为荷兰警方增加 7500 万欧元的资金，并对反移民事件后的执法袭击行为设定最低刑罚。

title: NATO countries take part in maritime drone exercises in Den Helder
title_zh: 北约国家参加在登海尔德举行的海上无人机演习
description: Special units from 17 NATO countries conducted exercises with sea drones in Den Helder on Wednesday.
description_zh: 来自 17 个北约国家的特种部队周三在登海尔德进行了海上无人机演习。

title: Schiphol appeals against court ruling scrapping restraining order against activists
title_zh: 史基浦机场就法院撤销针对活动人士的限制令的裁决提出上诉
description: Schiphol has filed an appeal against the ruling thatoverturned 37 access bans
description_zh: 史基浦机场已对推翻 37 项禁令的裁决提起上诉

title: Go Ahead Eagles fall just short in Europa League opener against FCSB
title_zh: 前进之鹰队在欧联杯首轮比赛中惜败于FCSB队
description: Go Ahead Eagles suffered a setback in the start of their first UEFA Europa League campaign on Thursday, losing 1-0 at home to Romanian side FCSB.
description_zh: 前进之鹰队周四在欧足联欧洲联赛首场比赛中遭遇挫折，主场以 0-1 负于罗马尼亚球队 FCSB。

title: Teens sentenced to prison, treatment for killing Syrian asylum seeker, 15, in Enschede
title_zh: 恩斯赫德青少年因杀害 15 岁叙利亚寻求庇护者被判入狱并接受治疗
description: Five young men have been sentenced in the fatal stabbing of 15-year-old Syrian refugee Ahmed Krd Hsan on the night of December 22, 2023, a court called “a senseless and excessive outbreak of violen
description_zh: 五名年轻男子因 2023 年 12 月 22 日晚刺死 15 岁的叙利亚难民艾哈迈德·克尔德·汉桑而被判刑，法院称这是“毫无意义的过度暴力事件”。

title: Dutch sign deal with Uganda to house rejected asylum seekers
title_zh: 荷兰与乌干达签署协议，为被拒绝的寻求庇护者提供住所
description: The caretaker Dutch government has signed an agreement with Uganda about setting up a transit hub for rejected asylum seekers,...
description_zh: 荷兰看守政府已与乌干达签署协议，为被拒绝的寻求庇护者设立中转枢纽，......

title: Dutch border forces have conducted over 123,000 checks, denied entry to 470 people
title_zh: 荷兰边境部队已进行超过 123,000 次检查，拒绝 470 人入境
description: The Royal Netherlands Marechaussee carried out 123,320 border checks between December 9 of last year and September 8 of this year.
description_zh: 荷兰皇家宪兵队自去年 12 月 9 日至今年 9 月 8 日期间共执行了 123,320 次边境检查。

title: Just Eat Takeaway to cut 200 Dutch jobs at Thuisbezorgd after AI reorganization
title_zh: AI 重组后，Just Eat Takeaway 将在 Thuisbezorgd 裁员 200 名荷兰员工
description: Just Eat Takeaway, known as Thuisbezorgd in the Netherlands, has announced plans to use AI to automate tasks within the company’s customer service, which will lead to the loss of around 200 jobs in
description_zh: Just Eat Takeaway（在荷兰被称为 Thuisbezorgd）宣布计划利用人工智能实现公司客户服务任务的自动化，这将导致该公司在

title: First suspect sentenced to prison for youth group clashes in Noord-Holland
title_zh: 北荷兰省首名青年团体冲突嫌疑人被判入狱
description: A Haarlem magistrate sentenced 20-year-old Dillian B. from Heemskerk to six months in prison on Thursday, with three months suspended on certain conditions.
description_zh: 周四，哈勒姆地方法官判处来自希姆斯科克的 20 岁男子迪利安·B 六个月监禁，并在一定条件下缓刑三个月。

title: KLM files preliminary injunction against unions over Schiphol ground staff strikes
title_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司就史基浦机场地勤人员罢工事件向工会提出初步禁令
description: KLM has filed a preliminary injunction against the unions in response to aplanned str
description_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司已向工会提交初步禁令，以回应一项计划中的罢工

title: Dutch households pay higher energy bills than their neighbours
title_zh: 荷兰家庭支付的能源费用比邻居更高
description: Dutch households face the highest gas bills in Europe after Sweden, with average annual costs reaching €1,801,  according to an...
description_zh: 一项调查显示，荷兰家庭的天然气费用是欧洲最高的，仅次于瑞典，平均每年费用达到 1,801 欧元……

title: GL-PvdA wants gov't to say politicians fuel extremism; Wilders won't moderate tone
title_zh: GL-PvdA 要求政府谴责政客助长极端主义；威尔德斯不会缓和语气
description: In the parliamentary debate on theviolent riots at an anti-asylum demon
description_zh: 在议会辩论中，关于反庇护恶魔的暴力骚乱

title: Public Prosecutor denies that Rotterdam police shot killed 15-year-old in the back
title_zh: 检察官否认鹿特丹警方从背后开枪打死了一名 15 岁少年
description: The15-year-old boy who the police shot deadin Capelle aan den IJssel on Sun
description_zh: 周日，在卡佩勒安登艾瑟尔被警察枪杀的 15 岁男孩

title: Lawyers sound alarm on months-long delays returning confiscated licenses
title_zh: 律师对没收执照的归还拖延数月发出警告
description: Citizens appealing traffic fines or facing license confiscation are sometimes left without their driver’s licenses for months due to administrative chaos at the Central Processing Office of the Pub
description_zh: 由于公共汽车中央处理办公室的行政混乱，对交通罚款或面临驾照没收的公民有时会几个月都拿不到驾照

title: Speed dating with councillors: The Hague aims at internationals
title_zh: 与议员快速约会：海牙瞄准国际人士
description: Edith Stein College teaches children of 70 nationalities – but on Wednesday night, its doors in The Hague opened to...
description_zh: 伊迪丝斯坦因学院的学生来自 70 个国家，但周三晚上，该学院在海牙的大门向...敞开。

title: Anti-immigration protest planned in Amsterdam's Dam Square on October 12
title_zh: 反移民抗议活动计划于 10 月 12 日在阿姆斯特丹水坝广场举行
description: A protest “against mass immigration for a safe Netherlands, and against the housing shortage” on Dam Square in Amsterdam was announced on TikTok.
description_zh: TikTok 上宣布了在阿姆斯特丹水坝广场举行的“反对大规模移民、维护荷兰安全、反对住房短缺”的抗议活动。

title: Intellectually disabled man abused for hours, robbed in Amsterdam city park
title_zh: 智障男子在阿姆斯特丹市公园遭受数小时虐待和抢劫
description: Two young men threatened, assaulted, robbed, and held a 24-year-old man with an intellectual disability captive for hours in an Amsterdam city park during the night of Monday to Tuesday,
description_zh: 周一至周二夜间，两名年轻男子在阿姆斯特丹市立公园内威胁、殴打、抢劫并囚禁了一名 24 岁的智力残疾男子数小时，

title: One in three households can’t afford flood damage as climate change strains insurance
title_zh: 气候变化导致保险承保能力下降，三分之一家庭无力承担洪灾损失
description: Climate change is increasing flood risks in the Netherlands, threatening households, insurers and the government with rising costs, the Netherlands Bureau for Economic Policy Analysis (CPB)
description_zh: 荷兰经济政策分析局 (CPB) 表示，气候变化正在增加荷兰的洪灾风险，威胁家庭、保险公司和政府，导致成本上升。

title: Investors may have lost millions on green crowdfunding platform
title_zh: 投资者可能在绿色众筹平台上损失了数百万美元
description: Hundreds of small investors who put money into renewable energy projects via crowdfunding site Duurzaaminvesteren.nl are facing heavy losses as...
description_zh: 数百名通过众筹网站 Duurzaaminvesteren.nl 向可再生能源项目投入资金的小投资者正面临巨额损失，因为……

title: Hague riots prove threat of normalizing right-wing extremism: counter-terror office
title_zh: 海牙骚乱证明极右翼极端主义正常化的威胁：反恐办公室
description: Last Saturday’sriots in The Hagueare a sign of the normalization o
description_zh: 上周六在海牙发生的骚乱是

title: Sunny weather and warmer temperatures forecast for the weekend
title_zh: 预计周末天气晴朗，气温回暖
description: After several grey and chilly days, the weather will turn sunnier and milder this weekend, according to forecaster Weeronline. Thursday...
description_zh: 据天气预报员 Weeronline 称，在经历了几天阴冷的天气后，本周末天气将转为晴朗温和。周四……

title: More refugee centre riots as MPs debate right wing extremism
title_zh: 议员辩论右翼极端主义引发更多难民中心骚乱
description: Riot police were drafted in to restore order after a demonstration outside a refugee centre in Hoofddorp near Amsterdam turned...
description_zh: 在阿姆斯特丹附近霍夫多普的一个难民中心外举行的示威活动演变成骚乱后，防暴警察被派去维持秩序……

title: KLM flight to Aalborg diverted over drones in Danish airspace
title_zh: 荷兰皇家航空公司飞往奥尔堡的航班因丹麦领空出现无人机而改道
description: Denmark closed the Aalborg Airport for over three hours on Wednesday due to unidentified drones in the airspace.
description_zh: 由于空域出现不明无人机，丹麦周三关闭了奥尔堡机场三个多小时。

title: Nearly 31,600 homes built in Netherlands in first half of 2025; Lowest number since 2018
title_zh: 2025 年上半年荷兰新建住宅近 31,600 套，为 2018 年以来最低
description: Nearly 31,600 new homes were built in the Netherlands in the first half of 2025, the lowest number in six months since 2018, Statistics Netherlands (CBS)
description_zh: 荷兰统计局 (CBS) 表示，2025 年上半年，荷兰新建住宅数量接近 31,600 套，为 2018 年以来六个月内的最低水平
